name: fileWriteFloat
title: fileWriteFloat
syntax: long fileWriteFloat(char section[], char entry[], float def, char file[]);
description: Analogous to fileWriteInt, but writes a float variable to the file instead of a text.
return: 0 if an error has occurred else 1

example.code:
...
if(!fileWriteInt("DeviceData","DeviceAddr",2.2, "TEST.INI"))
write("file error");
...
This call writes the following entry in the file TEST.INI:
[DeviceData]
DeviceAddr=2.2
